---
name: Feature request / new pattern
about: Suggest a new reference module, slash command, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What is currently painful or impossible when using BotForge?

## Proposed solution
- New reference / new command / extended rule / bugfix in pattern?
- Draft structure (headings, code skeleton) — optional but appreciated.

## Official Telegram / aiogram source
Link to `core.telegram.org/bots/...` or aiogram docs that back this up.

## Impact
Who benefits? Which mode (Lite / Pro / Media / SaaS)?

## Alternatives considered
Workarounds today, and why they're not enough.
